name: 02 - Cassie Aphtiton
description:
Heya, it's my 2nd bot ever and also second ever bot of this character!

=====

BLOCK TALES SPOILERS!!!

=====

I'm not sure where this pfp is from, but it's one of the first results when you search up "Block Tales Cassie" right now!

Note: No time travel or main plot here except for scenario 6

You could be anyone here, if you wanna be the player in scenario 6

=====

You can be whoever but implied civilian POV in some scenarios.

1: Cassie is crowned Queen

2: You were somehow able to talk with Cassie on her throne room. (Here's when you can do anything! Like ask to date her and stuff!!)

3: Cassie is alone on the bridge with her thoughts. You notice her.

4: You messed up

5: Another bridge scene. Same thing.

6: You're the player (Post Chapter 5)

7: Make your own scenario!!!

=====

04/30/26: Redid the grammar for the character card, gave the real name, improved scenario, added some example dialogues, and overall made Cassie more alive!

05/02/26: Added scenario 6, added other factions, Windforce implemented, new profile picture, and made other messages prettier.
